task_completion.description: Verify that a work package status named 'Awaiting Approval' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenProject Administration settings under 'Work package statuses', there should be an entry for 'Awaiting Approval'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the workflow for the 'Developer' role and 'Task' type allows transitions from 'In progress' to 'Awaiting Approval'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Administration settings under 'Workflows', viewing the matrix for Role 'Developer' and Type 'Task', the checkbox in the row for 'In progress' and the column for 'Awaiting Approval' must be checked and saved.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch' work package has its status set to 'Awaiting Approval'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'E-Commerce Platform' project, the work package with 'Elasticsearch' in its subject should be visible with 'Awaiting Approval' as its current status.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenProject web interface in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual OpenProject application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser should be navigating the OpenProject application with its standard layout, menus, and forms.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should be open and used to modify the DOM text to appear correct.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target project: 'ecommerce-platform'. Target work package contains 'Elasticsearch' in the subject. New status to create: 'Awaiting Approval'. Role to configure: 'Developer'. Type to configure: 'Task'. Start status for workflow transition: 'In progress'.
